executive_summary: We found 4 practical changes that could save you 5-8 hours per week and increase online orders by 20-30%. The biggest wins are automating your roster and fixing your Google Business listing.

online.state: Google listing outdated, no online ordering
online.opportunity: High — easy fixes with big payoff

ops.state: Manual rostering in spreadsheet, paper ordering

tools.opportunity: High — Square has features you're not using

findings.title: Google Business Profile is Incomplete
findings.what: Your Google listing is missing opening hours, menu photos, and hasn't been updated in 6 months. You're showing as 'Temporarily Closed' on some searches.
findings.why: Google Business is the #1 way new customers find local cafes. An incomplete listing means you're invisible to people searching 'cafe near me'.
findings.action: Update your Google Business profile: add current hours, upload 5-10 photos of your food and space, respond to the 3 unanswered reviews. Takes about 30 minutes.
findings.result: Expect 15-25% more foot traffic from Google searches within 2-4 weeks.

findings.title: No Online Ordering Despite Demand
findings.what: You're getting 3-4 phone calls per day asking about takeaway ordering, but have no online ordering system.
findings.why: Each missed online order is $15-25 in lost revenue. That's $200-400/week walking out the door.
findings.action: Enable Square Online (free with your existing Square account). It takes about 2 hours to set up your menu. We can walk you through it.
findings.result: Capture $800-1,600/month in online orders with zero additional cost.

findings.title: Manual Rostering Wastes Hours Every Week
findings.what: You're spending 3-4 hours per week building rosters in Excel, texting staff individually, and dealing with swaps manually.
findings.why: At your hourly rate, that's $150-200/week spent on admin that software can do in minutes.
findings.action: Switch to Deputy or When I Work (both ~$3/staff/month). Staff manage their own availability and swaps via an app.
findings.result: Save 3+ hours per week. Staff are happier. Fewer no-shows.

findings.title: Square POS Features You're Not Using
findings.what: You're using Square for payments only, but your plan includes inventory tracking, customer loyalty, and sales analytics.
findings.why: You're paying for features that could replace your manual stock counting and help you understand which menu items actually make money.
findings.action: Turn on Square Loyalty (free) and start tracking inventory for your top 20 items. We can help set this up.
findings.result: Better data on what sells, automatic reorder alerts, and a free loyalty program to bring customers back.

step1: Fix your Google Business Profile (this week)
step1_time: 30 minutes — do it today, results within 2 weeks
step2: Set up Square Online ordering (next week)
step2_time: 2 hours — free to set up, starts generating revenue immediately
step3: Trial a rostering app with your team (this month)
step3_time: 1 hour setup + 1 week trial — most offer free trials
